## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] CI/CD change (`ci:`)
- [ ] Documentation update (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore:`)
- [ ] Security fix (`security:`)
- [ ] Breaking change (include `!` in commit type, e.g. `feat!:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have run `pre-commit run --all-files` locally and all hooks pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation where applicable
- [ ] I have tested this change (describe how below)
